title: Beeper Recreation
description: The Bee + Creeper combo that appeared in Alan Becker's Animation vs. Minecraft Shorts Episode 33, now replacing the already cute bees in your world!
body:
When watching the latest episode of Animation vs. Minecraft (Episode 33 as of writing this), me and other viewers found the bee + creeper fusion cute. Now, after a few days, I have recreated the Bee Creeper, also known as Beeper or Zombee. If the bees weren't already cute enough for you, here's the Beeper.
NOTICE: The Beeper does not explode.
